heading: Your page
desc: Not an exercise. Not an example. This is something you built — and something is still missing from it.
how_it_grew_hint: Six times through the course the editor is empty and says "your page". Here they are.
empty_desc: You do not have a page yet.
empty_hint: It starts in lesson 7, when you choose what it is about. From there it grows six times — each time from an empty editor, from memory.
no_account: Your page lives only in this browser. Clear your history and it is gone.
